title: Senior Associate, Banking & Finance (5-7 PQE) - Dubai
description:
Role overview

An established practice is hiring a senior associate to join its banking and finance team in the region. The role focuses on lending and debt finance for regional and international clients.

Key responsibilities

  • Advising lenders and borrowers on bilateral and syndicated facilities
  • Drafting and negotiating finance documentation
  • Managing transactions to completion alongside the partner group

Candidate profile

  • 5 to 7 years post-qualification experience in banking and finance
  • Common law qualification
  • Regional experience preferred but not essential
